---
name: feature-brainstorming-prompt
description: This prompt is used to brainstorm and generate ideas for new features in a software project.
model: GPT-4.1
tools: [agent, todo, firecrawl/*]
argument-hint: Try `Please provide some ideas for new features in a task management application`
agent: Ask
---

When brainstorming new features for a software project, it's important to consider the needs of the users, the goals of the project, and the current trends in technology. Here are some steps to help you generate ideas for new features:

1. Identify the target audience: Understand who your users are and what they need from the application. This will help you generate features that are relevant and useful to them.
2. Analyze competitors: Look at similar applications in the market and identify any gaps or opportunities for improvement. This can inspire you to come up with unique features that set your application apart.
3. Consider user feedback: If you have an existing user base, gather feedback from them to understand what features they would like to see in the application. This can provide valuable insights into what users want and help you prioritize feature development.
4. Brainstorm with your team: Collaborate with your team members to generate ideas for new features. Encourage open discussion and creativity to come up with innovative solutions.
5. Use the "agent" tool to delegate tasks related to feature research and development, and the "todo" tool to keep track of feature ideas and their implementation status.
6. Prioritize features: Once you have a list of potential features, prioritize them based on factors such as user demand, development effort, and potential impact on the application. This will help you focus on the most important features first.
